response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio matches the provided scene context and reference texts perfectly. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized the lyrics reference for the JOYSOUND and Yoshinoya commercial segments. Discarded the silent parts but manually transcribed and translated the prominent on-screen text for the merchandise promotions according to Trigger 2. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are tightly timed to vocal activation and on-screen display times to ensure a seamless viewer experience. Extraneous background elements (such as the massive collage of small fan letters) were excluded to maintain clean presentation.
